title: OANDA Gateway Config
description: Venue-specific configuration for the OANDA trading gateway adaptor.

environment.description: OANDA environment to connect to. Practice uses the demo endpoints; live uses the production endpoints.

account_id.description: OANDA account identifier used for orders, balances, positions, and transaction streaming.

api_base_url.description: Optional override for the OANDA REST API base URL. If omitted, the adaptor derives the default from environment.

stream_base_url.description: Optional override for the OANDA transaction stream base URL. If omitted, the adaptor derives the default from environment.

secret_ref.description: Pilot/Vault logical reference for the OANDA API bearer token.
